content: I'm curious, from a technical POV, what's your idea. Merging excel files must be quite the headache

I discovered semi-recently that VBA can be used to split one large table into many smaller files and write them to individual folders based on content in the table.

I had used this concept to initialize the /Awakeners/ directory, but I've realized that I can make it do a lot more than just that. If I can build a directory list of every Key in my repo, then I can mass update the entire repo directly from new Source sheets. I can also use the Diff between them to identify what Keys are new, and simply add them to the directory table and have it automatically create new files wherever I want them.
